'''ngahuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tablature|tablature]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-h-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tablature|tablature]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngahuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæhizhith|ngæhizhith]] || [[word:ngæhizhij|ngæhizhij]] || [[word:ngæhizhish|ngæhizhish]] || [[word:ngæhizhi|ngæhizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngahuhuzhuth|ngahuhuzhuth]] || [[word:ngahuhuzhuj|ngahuhuzhuj]] || [[word:ngahuhuzhush|ngahuhuzhush]] || [[word:ngahuhuzhu|ngahuhuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngahuzhuth|ngahuzhuth]] || [[word:ngahuzhuj|ngahuzhuj]] || [[word:ngahuzhush|ngahuzhush]] || [[word:ngahuzhu|ngahuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngahufzhufth|ngahufzhufth]] || [[word:ngahufzhufj|ngahufzhufj]] || [[word:ngahufzhufsh|ngahufzhufsh]] || [[word:ngahufzhuf|ngahufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngahuzhuthu|ngahuzhuthu]] || [[word:ngahuzhuju|ngahuzhuju]] || [[word:ngahuzhushu|ngahuzhushu]] || [[word:ngahuzhuku|ngahuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngahuzhuth|ngahuzhuth]] || [[word:ngahuzhuj|ngahuzhuj]] || [[word:ngahuzhush|ngahuzhush]] || [[word:ngahuzhu|ngahuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngahuzhuthul|ngahuzhuthul]] || [[word:ngahuzhujul|ngahuzhujul]] || [[word:ngahuzhushul|ngahuzhushul]] || [[word:ngahuzhukul|ngahuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngahuzhuuthuthu|ngahuzhuuthuthu]] || [[word:ngahuzhuujuju|ngahuzhuujuju]] || [[word:ngahuzhuushushu|ngahuzhuushushu]] || [[word:ngahuzhuuku|ngahuzhuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngahuzhuthun|ngahuzhuthun]] || [[word:ngahuzhujun|ngahuzhujun]] || [[word:ngahuzhushun|ngahuzhushun]] || [[word:ngahuzhukun|ngahuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngahuzhuthuoro|ngahuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:ngahuzhujuoro|ngahuzhujuoro]] || [[word:ngahuzhushuoro|ngahuzhushuoro]] || [[word:ngahuzhukuoro|ngahuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]

{{wordpage|5bad82d}}
